productDisplayName: 2go Active Gear USA Men Red Bjorn Track Pants
description: Style noteTrain better in these tracks from 2Go. The soft and broad elasticated waistband sits snug around your waist, while the drawstring allows you to further customise the Fit. These tracks stay dry during long active days. Team it with a T-shirt and fitness shoes for a sweat-free workout session.Product DetailsRed track pants made of performance premium cotton, has an elasticated waistband with a drawstring on the inside, two insert pockets on the sides, printed brand logo on left leg, contrast panel stitched to the sides and a coin pocket inside the left insert pocketMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash in cold water using mild detergentDry in shadeWarm iron onlyDo not bleach Size and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size M
